capture=visual_table
source=dosbox-debug
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
scenario=state2_death_table_consumption
runtime_cs=01ED
runtime_ds=0C8F

break ghidra=1000:3108 runtime=01ED:3108 label=state2_death_helper
break ghidra=1000:6053 runtime=01ED:6053 label=actor_update_animation
break ghidra=1000:6148 runtime=01ED:6148 label=actor_frame_consumer
break ghidra=1000:7C89 runtime=01ED:7C89 label=state2_countdown
break ghidra=1000:7DDF runtime=01ED:7DDF label=state2_return_active

actor slot=0 kind=player1 state=2 anim_current=0x4a anim_first=0x4a anim_last=0x4f anim_counter=3 anim_delay=3 anim_mode=1 anim_step=1
visual frame=0x4a row_addr=0xc44a row=10,10,7d,43 bank=BOMOMIMK sprite_index=66 sprite_source=row_byte3 draw_dx=16 draw_dy=16
effect_before slot=0 x=0x0068 y=0x00a8 frame=0x4a flags=0x0000
effect_after slot=0 x=0x0068 y=0x00a8 frame=0x4a flags=0x0000

dump DS:C440
0C8F:C440   7D 40 10 10 7D 41 10 10 7D 42 10 10 7D 43 10 10
